title: Resource Pandas
body:
With this mod you can convert panda's into resource sneezing goldmines. #### **Resources** By default the mod comes with 9 standard recipes, These can be removed and exchanged for new ones if desired using datapacks. The jsons contain the following values: - **name** - The friendly name for the resource to be displayed in the spawn egg name / JEI info. - **ingredient** *-* The input ingredient used to convert a panda - **hexColor** - The hex color the panda's overlay will be. (Has to start with a #) - **alpha** - the opacity of the overlay (by default this is 1.0) - **chance** - the chance between 0 and 1 that a sneeze will produce an item. (0.6 = 60%) - **result** - The item the panda can sneeze out. (If a tag is supplied it will chose the first item from that tag) For examples check the [repo](https://github.com/Mrbysco/ResourcePandas/tree/main/src/main/resources/data/resourcepandas/recipes "Built in recipes") #### **Obtaining a resource panda** You obtain a resource panda by feeding it one of the specified input items.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
